title: Luffy Strikes Back at Krieg
scene: On pages 14–17, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. The Baratie battle turns into a test of will as Luffy keeps challenging Krieg despite poison, weapons, and exhaustion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haha... did he die after refusing to run away...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Using my own trick against me...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It looks as if you're going to stop at nothing to hit me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then why don't you try hitting my "Kenzan Cape!?"

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: that dirty son of a... it's a spike- covered cape!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's no way he can touch Krieg,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: with that thing prot- acting him!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You can't lay a hand nor foot on me as long as i have my...

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
